_instructions: Add your projects here. Each project should showcase your work.

projects.title: streamlit_mcp_cortex
projects.description: Streamlit app powered by Snowflake Cortex AI and MCP (Model Context Protocol) for natural language querying and AI-driven analytics directly in Snowflake. Stack: Python · Streamlit · Snowflake Cortex · MCP

projects.title: elt-pipeline-dbt-snowflake-airflow
projects.description: End-to-end ELT pipeline with Apache Airflow for orchestration, dbt (Medallion architecture) for SQL transformations, and Snowflake as the cloud data warehouse. Features incremental models, SCD Type 2 snapshots, and automated scheduling. Stack: Python · dbt · Airflow · Snowflake · SQL

projects.title: Data_Profiler_App
projects.description: Native Streamlit app for interactive data profiling and exploration within Snowflake — schema inspection, column statistics, null analysis, and data quality checks. Stack: Python · Streamlit · Snowflake

projects.title: contribution-history
projects.description: Auto-generated GitHub contribution history — tracks and visualizes commit activity across repositories. Stack: GitHub API · Python

projects.title: realtime-warehousing-with-snowflake
projects.description: Real-time data warehousing using Snowflake Streams & Tasks for incremental change propagation, Snowpipe for automated ingestion from S3/Azure Blob, and dynamic warehouse management for cost governance. Stack: SQL · Snowflake · Python

projects.title: end-to-end-pipeline-snowflake-dbt-tableau
projects.description: Full analytics pipeline from raw ingestion to BI dashboards — Snowflake for cloud warehousing, dbt for modular SQL transformations, and Tableau for business intelligence reporting. Demonstrates the modern data stack end to end. Stack: SQL · dbt · Snowflake · Tableau
